mapper.sql: id, title, description, type, status, priority, site_id, template_id, assigned_to, created_by, completed_steps, step_data, accepted, accepted_at, accepted_user_id, departure_at, departure_photo, arrival_at, arrival_photo, completion_photo, cause, solution, related_ticket_ids, problem_type, created_at, updated_at, due_date
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name, template.name as template_name, site.name as site_name, site.address as site_address FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id LEFT JOIN templates template ON t.template_id = template.id LEFT JOIN sites site ON t.site_id = site.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.status = #{status}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.assigned_to = #{assignedTo}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.created_by = #{createdBy}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.status = #{status} AND t.assigned_to = #{assignedTo}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.type = #{type} AND t.priority = #{priority}

SELECT t.*, creator.id as creator_id, creator.name as creator_name, creator.username as creator_username, assignee.id as assignee_id, assignee.name as assignee_name FROM tickets t LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN `groups` assignee ON t.assigned_to = assignee.id WHERE t.due_date < #{date} AND t.status NOT IN
#{status}
